title: Storyboard · "Knock" — Radio→Animation production script · S4
body:
**Scene 4: 03:00–04:00 · The Lists**

HERO FRAME: Close on a yellow legal pad on Walter's desk, covered in his neat accountant's handwriting · several names crossed out · several with dates · one column headed simply "STILL?" · a fountain pen lying across the page

MOTION: kling — the pen rolls slowly across the page from the slight tilt of the desk. A name on the list is highlighted by a soft beam of late-afternoon light moving slowly across the page.

MOOD: Methodical despair.

AUDIO: Walter: *"I keep lists. I have a list of the streets I have walked down. I have a list of the apartments I have entered. I have a list of the things I have looked for. I have a list of the people I have not found."*

source.label: Dimension X episode #05 (NBC Radio, May 6, 1950) adapting Fredric Brown's 1948 short-short story "Knock" (originally in *Thrilling Wonder Stories*, December 1948)

author: matt

witnesses.label: Rufinus of Aquileia, Commentary on the Apostles' Creed (c. AD 404)
Pirminius, De singulis libris canonicis scarapsus (c. AD 750) — earliest received form
Cited by every major catechism since 8th century
